description: Configurable business rules for the WaTech Application Inventory web app. These rules are managed by WaTech admins through the app and drive notifications, validations, and data quality logic.

alerting.future: Designed for extensibility — agency-defined alerts to be added in a future release
alerting.note: Alert engine should be built as a generic rules processor, not hardcoded to specific metrics

stalenessThresholds.description: How long before an application record is considered stale and triggers a notification

warning.label: Stale Warning
warning.description: Application record has not been reviewed or updated in 90 days

critical.label: Stale Critical
critical.description: Application record has not been reviewed or updated in 180 days

notifications.description: Rules governing when and how notifications are sent to agency users

triggers.message: One or more of your application records have not been updated in 90 days. Please review and confirm accuracy.
One or more of your application records are critically out of date (180+ days). Immediate review required.
Annual certification is due in 30 days. Review your application inventory to ensure all records are current.
Annual certification is due in 7 days. Please complete your review and submit.
An application has been marked as retired. Please confirm this is accurate.

dataQuality.description: Rules that enforce data quality on application inventory records

annualCertification.description: Rules governing the annual certification process
